# PERF-106 positive: sync.Map used in a write-heavy workload
lang: go
file: PERF-106-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "sync"

type Entry struct {
	Key   string
	Value int
}

func UseMap() {
	var m sync.Map
	for i := 0; i < 100; i++ {
		m.Store(Entry{Key: "k", Value: i}, i)
		m.Delete("k")
	}
	// Single read at the end; the loop body is all writes.
	_ = m.Load("k")
}
